prediction.reasoning: Stock prices are influenced by numerous market variables including macroeconomic conditions, company performance, and investor sentiment. Given the short time frame of 2 days and assuming no major market-moving event, I primarily relied on typical short-term price fluctuation patterns and market volatility analysis for PYPL to establish these confidence intervals. The intervals represent the range within which the price is expected to fall most of the time, given the inherent uncertainty in stock price movements. Since the historical volatility of PYPL is not very high, these intervals are relatively narrow.
